testcase.name: testReleaseDateSorting

failure.message: Sorting by Release Date failed to alter list state. did not expect [Chart insights] but found [Chart insights]

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: Sorting by Release Date failed to alter list state. did not expect [Chart insights] but found [Chart insights] at org.testng.Assert.fail(Assert.java:111) at testcase.name: testAlphabeticalSorting

failure.message: Failed to scrape top 10 records. expected [true] but found [false]
